notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Ketel Marte doubles (18) on a line drive to left fielder Victor Bericoto. Pavin Smith scores. Tommy Troy scores. Ketel Marte to 3rd. Throwing error by shortstop Christian Koss.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Giants challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Casey Schmitt reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Geraldo Perdomo.

notableEvents.label: Luis Arraez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Luis Arraez grounds into a double play, second baseman Ketel Marte to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman Pavin Smith. Christian Koss out at 2nd. Luis Arraez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Ketel Marte doubles (18) on a line drive to left fielder Victor Bericoto. Pavin Smith scores. Tommy Troy scores. Ketel Marte to 3rd. Throwing error by shortstop Christian Koss.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Ketel Marte doubles (18) on a line drive to left fielder Victor Bericoto. Pavin Smith scores. Tommy Troy scores. Ketel Marte to 3rd. Throwing error by shortstop Christian Koss.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Gabriel Moreno singles on a line drive to right fielder Heliot Ramos. Gabriel Moreno to 3rd. Gabriel Moreno advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by shortstop Christian Koss.

notableEvents.label: Casey Schmitt reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Giants challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Casey Schmitt reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Geraldo Perdomo.
